name: paralegals in law firms managing 5–15 cases/month tool
description: For paralegals in law firms processing 5–15 cases/month, missed legal document filing deadlines cause potential penalties. We provide automated deadline tracking instead of manual tracking through calendars and reminders.
target_audience: paralegals in law firms managing 5–15 cases/month
